ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Learn more [in this video](https://youtu.be/we8MT8q5gGQ?si=oti6CcuK22fjkkLY) about why your family should learn Sol-fa. 
[ ] Compose your own sol-fa melodies using multiple keys. Use dynamics as well as the various rhythms and notes you've learned.
[ ] Figure out the sol-fa syllables for your hymn, folk, and modern language songs and identify the key.
[ ] Pick sol-fa exercises we have sung in C, G, or F and write them on the staff.
